mission: Sell managed AI assistant packages to 20+ SMB clients at $2,000-$5,000/mo within 90 days

products.name: OpenClaw Agent Setup
products.description: Single managed AI assistant deployed on Orgo VM, handling inbound lead capture, qualification, and follow-up automation for staffing, home services, and insurance companies.
products.target_customer: Staffing Agencies, Home Services (HVAC/Plumbing/Electrical), Insurance Agencies (10-50 employees)

products.name: Autonomous Business System
products.description: Full Paperclip multi-agent deployment with CEO, CMO, COO, VP Sales, and 3 SDRs handling entire go-to-market operations including lead generation, qualification, and delivery.
products.target_customer: Scaling SMBs ready to automate entire business operations (50-200 employees)

cross_sell: Human VA services at $1,500/mo for personal admin, email management, and account management
pain_points: Spending 60% of time on admin instead of revenue-generating work
Missing 40% of inbound calls/leads due to manual processing
No follow-up system causing lost deals worth thousands per month
proof_point: One staffing agency client went from $180K to $340K revenue in one quarter after OpenClaw Agent Setup, capturing 100% of leads and automating qualification
